name: privelegy-bali-club

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test lib/health.test.ts lib/navigation.test.ts lib/photo-policy.test.ts lib/i18n/locales.test.ts lib/i18n/dictionaries.test.ts lib/domain/resort-import.test.ts lib/domain/resort-repo.test.ts lib/domain/menu.test.ts lib/coverage-model.test.ts lib/day-builder.test.ts lib/mobile-api.test.ts lib/external-links.test.ts lib/public-request-policy.test.ts lib/request-correlation.test.ts lib/site-origin-policy.test.ts lib/consent.test.ts lib/seo/places-indexing.test.ts lib/seo/sitemap-last-modified.test.ts lib/actions/event-analytics.test.ts mobile/tests/*.test.ts scripts/mobile-native-runtime.test.ts scripts/mobile-shell-contract.test.ts scripts/mobile-storage.test.ts scripts/capacitor-release.test.ts scripts/android-release.test.ts scripts/assetlinks-generator.test.mjs scripts/device-evidence.test.mjs scripts/ios-app-shell.test.mjs scripts/ios-release-core.test.mjs scripts/partner-portal-boundary.test.mjs scripts/performance-boundary.test.mjs scripts/release-artifacts-core.test.mjs scripts/store-assets.test.mjs scripts/store-package.test.mjs
scripts.ios:archive:dry: npm run mobile:build && npm run mobile:sync:ios && node scripts/verify-ios-release.mjs --archive
scripts.android:debug: npm run mobile:build && npm run mobile:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew --no-daemon lint test assemblePlayDebug
scripts.android:release:play: npm run mobile:build && npm run mobile:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew --no-daemon lint test bundlePlayRelease
scripts.android:release:rustore: npm run mobile:build && npm run mobile:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew --no-daemon lint test assembleRustoreRelease
scripts.android:release: npm run android:release:play && npm run android:release:rustore

//browserslist: Modern targets so Next/SWC stops shipping ES2022 polyfills (Array.at/flat/flatMap, Object.fromEntries/hasOwn, String.trimStart/End) — ~13.8 KB of legacy JS off every page. Floor is early-2022 browsers, which covers the tourist audience's phones.
